author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Guilty Gear: Strive - ROBO-KY Character Reveal Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/guilty-gear-strive/

■The fate of the universe will be determined...
The story of Guilty Gear, spanning over 25 years, will finally come to a conclusion in “GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-." The trials and tribulations of the series’ heroes and villains will finally be resolved. Discover the astonishing truth awaiting at the end of all things.

Check out the play style of the second character in Season Pass 5, ROBO-KY, coming July 2, 2026!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #guiltygearstrive

Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game launches July 23rd.

:facepunch: 12 unique fighters
:earth_americas: Rollback netcode + crossplay

Pre-order now on PS5!
